The recent news headlines suggest a potential escalation of the Iran war, which could lead to increased risk sentiment and a subsequent flight to safe-haven assets like gold, thus driving up the price of XAU_USD. The current bearish trend may be reversed as investors seek refuge in gold amid rising geopolitical tensions.
